title: An open-label extension study to evaluate safety and efficacy of pazopanib in patients with advanced renal cell carcinoma.
abstract: Evaluation of the safety and efficacy of pazopanib, a multikinase angiogenesis inhibitor, in a single-arm, open-label, extension study (VEG107769/NCT00387764) for placebo-treated patients with advanced renal cell carcinoma (RCC) from a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled phase III study (VEG105192/NCT00334282).
